revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-6-095

Alternantive term: Shuttering

Temporary boarding or sheeting used to contain concrete during pouring and setting, shaped internally to the same profile as required for the external face of the structure.

{{IALAFooter}}
